news.title:
REC Ltd confirms payment of interest on NCD Series GOI I for FY25-26.
Interest payment of ₹73.7 Cr was made timely on 23 March 2026 as scheduled.
news.summary:
REC Ltd confirms payment of interest on NCD Series GOI I for FY25-26.
Interest payment of ₹73.7 Cr was made timely on 23 March 2026 as scheduled.

news.title:
REC Ltd's board to meet on March 25, 2026, to discuss market borrowing plans for FY 2026-27.
The meeting aligns with SEBI's Listing and Disclosure Regulations, ensuring compliance.
news.summary:
REC Ltd's board to meet on March 25, 2026, to discuss market borrowing plans for FY 2026-27.
The meeting aligns with SEBI's Listing and Disclosure Regulations, ensuring compliance.

news.title:
REC, PFC, Castrol India, and India Glycols announce record dates for dividend payouts.
India Glycols offers Rs 7.50/share, Castrol Rs 5.25/share, PFC Rs 3.25/share, REC Rs 3.20/share dividends.
news.summary:
REC, PFC, Castrol India, and India Glycols announce record dates for dividend payouts.
India Glycols offers Rs 7.50/share, Castrol Rs 5.25/share, PFC Rs 3.25/share, REC Rs 3.20/share dividends.

news.title:
REC Ltd fined ₹5.43L GST for non-compliance on board rules in Q4 2025.
Board seeks fine waiver; delays tied to Ministry of Power appointment process.
news.summary:
REC Ltd fined ₹5.43L GST for non-compliance on board rules in Q4 2025.
Board seeks fine waiver; delays tied to Ministry of Power appointment process.

news.title:
REC Ltd declared a dividend of ₹32.46/share with ex-date March 20, 2026.
Dividend yield is 6.02%. Long-term returns over 3-5 years show significant growth.
news.summary:
REC Ltd declared a dividend of ₹32.46/share with ex-date March 20, 2026.
Dividend yield is 6.02%. Long-term returns over 3-5 years show significant growth.

news.title:
REC Ltd confirms timely interest payment of ₹267.4 Cr on NCD Series 208 due 16 March 2026.
Interest record date was 2 March 2026, with last payment made on 15 March 2025.
news.summary:
REC Ltd confirms timely interest payment of ₹267.4 Cr on NCD Series 208 due 16 March 2026.
Interest record date was 2 March 2026, with last payment made on 15 March 2025.

news.title:
REC announces ₹3.20/share 4th interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Record date is March 20, 2026; payments expected by April 14, 2026.
news.summary:
REC announces ₹3.20/share 4th interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Record date is March 20, 2026; payments expected by April 14, 2026.

news.title: REC Limited to discuss 4th interim dividend on March 16.
news.summary: REC Limited to discuss 4th interim dividend on March 16.

news.title:
REC Ltd's board meeting on March 16, 2026, to consider 4th interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Trading window for REC Ltd shares closed till March 18, 2026; reopens March 19, 2026.
news.summary:
REC Ltd's board meeting on March 16, 2026, to consider 4th interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Trading window for REC Ltd shares closed till March 18, 2026; reopens March 19, 2026.

news.title:
REC Ltd confirms timely interest and redemption payments for NCDs Series 214A and 219 as per SEBI regulations.
Interest payments of ₹36.5 Cr and ₹238.6 Cr, and full redemption of ₹500 Cr and ₹3148.7 Cr, completed on 27-02-2026.
news.summary:
REC Ltd confirms timely interest and redemption payments for NCDs Series 214A and 219 as per SEBI regulations.
Interest payments of ₹36.5 Cr and ₹238.6 Cr, and full redemption of ₹500 Cr and ₹3148.7 Cr, completed on 27-02-2026.

news.title:
REC Ltd's subsidiary, Umred Power Transmission Ltd, was sold to Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Co.
The transaction, completed on Feb 26, 2026, involved a consideration of Rs. 2.34 crore, not classified as a related party deal.
news.summary:
REC Ltd's subsidiary, Umred Power Transmission Ltd, was sold to Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Co.
The transaction, completed on Feb 26, 2026, involved a consideration of Rs. 2.34 crore, not classified as a related party deal.

news.title:
The power ministry forms a high-level committee to oversee PFC-REC merger.
The committee includes PFC and REC Chairmen and a power ministry Joint Secretary.
news.summary:
The power ministry forms a high-level committee to oversee PFC-REC merger.
The committee includes PFC and REC Chairmen and a power ministry Joint Secretary.

news.title:
REC filed an IBC plea against Hiranmaye Energy for INR 21.8 bln dues.
SC upheld IBC proceedings against Hiranmaye Energy, rejecting promoter plea.
news.summary:
REC filed an IBC plea against Hiranmaye Energy for INR 21.8 bln dues.
SC upheld IBC proceedings against Hiranmaye Energy, rejecting promoter plea.

news.title:
Government bond prices dip ahead of ₹379B state debt auction; 10-20 year bonds attract better bids due to higher yields.
Private placements active: JSW Steel (₹50B), Axis Bank (₹350B), REC Limited (₹30B), and others raising funds via bonds.
news.summary:
Government bond prices dip ahead of ₹379B state debt auction; 10-20 year bonds attract better bids due to higher yields.
Private placements active: JSW Steel (₹50B), Axis Bank (₹350B), REC Limited (₹30B), and others raising funds via bonds.

news.title:
REC's arm RECPDCL formed Vizag Power Transmission Ltd for green hydrogen project.
REC shares rose 1.9%, closing at ₹353.5; REC recently became a PFC subsidiary.
news.summary:
REC's arm RECPDCL formed Vizag Power Transmission Ltd for green hydrogen project.
REC shares rose 1.9%, closing at ₹353.5; REC recently became a PFC subsidiary.

news.title: REC forms Vizag Power Transmission Limited for green hydrogen and ammonia transmission project in Vizag Phase-I.
news.summary: REC forms Vizag Power Transmission Limited for green hydrogen and ammonia transmission project in Vizag Phase-I.

news.title:
Power Finance Corp. and REC Ltd. merger aims to boost power project financing and ease lending limits in India's credit market.
The merger may raise loan ceilings for large projects, stimulate investor demand, and lower yields on AAA-rated debt.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corp. and REC Ltd. merger aims to boost power project financing and ease lending limits in India's credit market.
The merger may raise loan ceilings for large projects, stimulate investor demand, and lower yields on AAA-rated debt.

news.title:
PFC and REC confirm progress on their planned merger, aiming for a stronger balance sheet.
The state-owned power sector financiers updated on the merger plans in New Delhi.
news.summary:
PFC and REC confirm progress on their planned merger, aiming for a stronger balance sheet.
The state-owned power sector financiers updated on the merger plans in New Delhi.

news.title:
REC Ltd sold 100 shares of Bellary Davanagere Power Transmission Ltd to Power Grid Corporation.
The sale, via tariff-based bidding, fetched approx ₹130.2 crore; unit had negligible income last year.
news.summary:
REC Ltd sold 100 shares of Bellary Davanagere Power Transmission Ltd to Power Grid Corporation.
The sale, via tariff-based bidding, fetched approx ₹130.2 crore; unit had negligible income last year.

news.title:
REC Ltd announces change in senior management; Exec Dir Chandra Sekhar Sakhamuri repatriated to parent cadre Tamil Nadu.
Cessation effective Feb 11, 2026; no additional disclosure of relationships or brief profile provided.
news.summary:
REC Ltd announces change in senior management; Exec Dir Chandra Sekhar Sakhamuri repatriated to parent cadre Tamil Nadu.
Cessation effective Feb 11, 2026; no additional disclosure of relationships or brief profile provided.
